_comment: Which 'end user fill' fields the agent may auto-fill from the buyer column of
Every other 'end user fill' field stays blank, even when the workbook carries a
buyer value for it. Add a field name here to start filling it — no code change.
Market is listed but the PO wins when it names a market: the buyer value is only
the fallback, per the workbook's own 'Follow PO. If not end user fill' wording.
